{{routes.eyebrow}}

{{routes.h2}}

{{routes.intro}}

Route 01

Bay Trail

This one hugs the bay and takes you to the bridge. It's flat, beautiful, and fun, with panoramic views of the water the whole way. Perfect on a nice day.

Route 02

City to Sea

The city's best ride, without a doubt, is through the park along JFK Promenade. Go from the piers of the Ferry Building to the plovers of Sunset Dunes via the Wiggle.

Route 03

El Corazón

The heart of the city. This route passes through nearly a dozen neighborhoods — start in the Excelsior and end at Aquatic Park, threading through Glen Park, the Mission, Hayes Valley, Civic Center, and Polk.
